page_metadata.biotools__summary: muCNV is genotyping structural variants for population-level sequencingMulti-sample SV genotyper for large-scale WGS data. muCNV uses multiple steps for multi-sample SV genotyping, to handle large number of samples and to enable efficient parallelization:.
